name: bc-on-linux-test Agent Ruleset
description: Every documented rule from the 9 emitting analyzers (CodeCop, UICop, PerTenantExtensionCop, ALCops.LinterCop/ApplicationCop/PlatformCop/TestAutomationCop/FormattingCop/DocumentationCop) is explicitly classified. Criterion: rules that only benefit human-facing typography or XML-doc style are Hidden; everything that catches correctness, perf, security, naming consistency, or end-user UI quality (Captions/Tooltips visible in the BC client) is Error. generalAction=Error as a safety net for any new upstream rule that isn't classified yet, but the per-rule list is the source of truth and should be kept exhaustive.

rules.justification: BinaryOperatorSpacing. Spaces around binary operators. Pure typography; affects human reading only, no agent value.
UnaryOperatorNoSpacing. Pure typography around unary operators.
UnaryOperatorSpacing. Pure typography around NOT.
OnlyUseBeginEndForCompoundStatements. User decision: treated as typography.
UseParenthesisForFunctionCall. Consistent function-call syntax reduces parser ambiguity for agents scanning code.
TrailingBeginShouldBeOnTheSameLine. Pure line-break preference; no semantic effect.
KeywordShouldBeFirstOnLine. Pure line-break preference.
VariableDeclarationsShouldBeOrderedByType. User decision: declaration order is a personal preference, not enforceable.
SubstituteIfElseWithCaseStatementIfMoreThanTwoAlternatives. CASE is structurally clearer than chained IF/ELSE and easier to refactor mechanically.
DoNotNestWiths. Nested WITH is deprecated and ambiguous about which record a field reference resolves to.
PermissionSet extension: no perms for foreign objects. Real correctness — permission grants must stay within the app.
PermissionSet extension: no perms from foreign sets. Real correctness — closure of foreign permissions is opaque.
PermissionSet extension: no transitive foreign perms. Same reasoning as AA0050/AA0051.
PermissionSet extension: no wildcards. Explicit grants are auditable; wildcards are not.
NameOfVariablesMustBeSuffixedWithTypeObjectName. Produces awkward names like CustomerCustomer for 'Record Customer'; type info is one declaration away.
TemporaryVariablesMustBePrefixedTemp. Prefix telegraphs that the variable holds a temporary instance — useful classifier for any reader.
TextConstLabelVariableNamesShouldHaveApprovedSuffix. Suffix (Lbl/Msg/Err/Qst/Tok) telegraphs the Label's role at the call site.
DoOnlyLowerPermissionsInsideTestProcedures. Tests must not silently elevate runtime permissions — real test-isolation correctness.
DoNotHaveIdentifiersWithQuotesInTheName. Quoted-name identifiers complicate cross-references and grep.
UseCamelCasePropertyValuesForApiPages. API surface contract — clients depend on the casing.
UseCamelCaseFieldNamesForApiPages. Same as AA0101 for field control names.
UseCamelCasePropertyValuesForApiQueries. Same API contract for queries.
UseCamelCaseColumnNamesForApiQueries. Same API contract for query columns.
PagePartMustNotReferToParentPage. Real correctness — circular references break composition.
ApiPageCanOnlyReferToTheSameSubpageOnce. Real correctness — duplicate subpage refs are invalid API shape.
StringParamsMustMatchPlaceholders. Mismatch between Error/Message format string and supplied args is a real runtime bug.
DoNotWriteCodeThatWillNeverBeHit. Unreachable code is dead weight that lies about intent.
DoNotDeclareVariablesThatAreUnused. Unused vars rot and confuse readers.
DoNotAssignToStringWithSmallerCapacity. Real type-safety violation — silent truncation at runtime.
DoNotDeclareParametersByReferenceIfNeverChanged. Wrongly-declared 'var' parameters mislead callers about mutation semantics.
OnlyUseAssertErrorInTestCodeunits. AssertError outside tests indicates misused API.
DoNotFindRecordAndNotUse. Find/FindFirst/FindSet without using the record is dead code paying I/O cost.
FindSetFindShouldBeUsedWithNext. FindSet without Next loop is the wrong API — use Get/FindFirst instead.
ApplicationAreaHasInvalidValue. Invalid ApplicationArea values silently hide the control.
DoNotWriteActionsWithNoEffect. Dead actions in the UI pretend to do something they don't.
GlobalLocalVariablesShouldNotHaveSameName. Shadowing causes real bugs — the wrong scope is bound silently.
ApplicationAreaIncorrectOrder. Correct value order avoids unexpected visibility behavior.
ApplicationAreaAllShouldBeAlone. 'All' combined with other values is ambiguous; runtime behavior is undefined.
ApplicationAreaBasicAndSuite. Basic without Suite (or vice versa) misses customers — pairing is the established convention.
DoNotNameLocalVarAsFieldOrMethod. Real ambiguity — the symbol resolver picks one, and it may not be the intended one.
DoNotNameMethodAsField. Same ambiguity hazard as AA0202 across method/field.
DoNotNameGlobalVarAsFieldOrMethod. Same ambiguity hazard.
VariablesMustAlwaysBeInitialized. Reading an unassigned variable is a real bug regardless of AL's default-value behavior.
InitializedVariablesMustAlwaysBeUsed. Assigning then ignoring is dead writes.
EventSubscriberFunctionsMustBeLocal. Non-local subscribers expand the public surface unintentionally.

SuboptimalIndex. User decision: filtering on a non-indexed field is always a tradeoff (small dataset, edge-case lookup, deliberate non-indexed scan) — the rule can't tell when it's wrong, so it doesn't pull weight as an Error.
CalcFieldsOnlyOnFlowFields. CalcFields on non-FlowFields is a no-op that misleads about intent.
ObsoleteJustification. Obsolete attributes must declare reason and stage — downstream consumers (including future agents) need the rationale.
BlindWriteLocalRecord. Modifying a local record without setting fields explicitly is fragile.
FollowFileNameGuide. Consistent file naming is critical for grep, navigation, and pattern-matching by agents.
PassUserMessageAndErrorByTextConstant. Error/Message text must be a Label for telemetry and localization.
StrSubstNoFormatStringShouldBeTextConstantOrLabel. Same telemetry/localization concern for format strings.

TooltipMustBeFilledOnPageForFieldsAndActions. Fires on every page object including internal/API/test pages where Tooltip is impractical; AA0220/AA0221/AA0223/AA0225/AA0226 cover the *value* on user-facing pages where Tooltips actually exist.
TooltipForFieldMustStartWithSpecifies. End-user UI text style for BC client — the app ships to humans who need consistent wording.
TooltipLanguageValueMustBeFilled. Empty Tooltip translation breaks localization for end users.
OptionCaptionMustBeFilledOnPageForOptionFields. End-user UI — un-captioned options show as raw integers in the BC client.
OptionCaptionLanguageValueMustBeFilled. Empty OptionCaption translation breaks localization.
CountOfOptionsCaptionIsWrong. Mismatch between Option members and OptionCaption count is a real bug — UI shows wrong labels.
CaptionMustBeFilledOnPageForFields. End-user UI — un-captioned fields show as raw identifiers.
CaptionLanguageValueMustBeFilled. Empty Caption translation breaks localization.
AlwaysGuardMethodsWithUnhandledErrorsInUpgradeCodeunits. Upgrade-codeunit errors brick tenant upgrades.
TheLocalMethodIsDeclaredButNeverUsed. Dead local methods rot.
NoVersionNumberOnBCAssembliesDotNetVars. Pinning a BC assembly version makes the code break on every BC update.
DoNotUseStrSubstNoInErrorMessage. Use Error() format string directly so the platform owns the substitution and the telemetry tag.
FlowFieldOfTableShouldBeIndexed. Real perf concern — unindexed FlowField CalcSums scans the table.
UseGetFindFirstAndFindLastWithoutNext. Calling Find with no Next loop is the wrong API.
TooltipMustBeFilledOnTableForFields. End-user UI — table-level Tooltip flows to every page that exposes the field.
WhenUsingOnInstallPerCompanyAddCodeToCompanyInitializeSubscription. Missing CompanyInitialize subscriber leaves new companies in a half-initialized state.
NonTemporaryVariablesMustNotBePrefixedTemp. Inverse of AA0073 — the prefix lies if the instance is not temporary.
EmailAndPhoneNoMustNotBePresentInTheSource. Privacy/security — PII in source code leaks via repository history.
UseLowercaseForLanguageKeywords. Pure typography preference; analyzer default is Hidden — listed explicitly so generalAction can't promote it.
PartialRecordsDetectJitLoads. JIT loads on partial records cause unexpected SQL traffic.
DoNotRunUpgradeCodeunit. Manual Codeunit.Run on an Upgrade codeunit bypasses the platform's idempotency tracking.
ParametersGlobalVariablesShouldNotHaveSameName. Parameter shadowing global is a real ambiguity bug.
DoNotNameParametersAsFieldOrMethod. Same ambiguity hazard as AA0202/AA0203/AA0204 for parameters.
DoNotSuppressAllDiagnostics. A blanket #pragma disables every rule including future correctness rules — must be per-rule.
UseNamespaces. Namespaces required for unambiguous cross-app references; without them, an object name change anywhere can silently break this app.
AddThis. 'this.member' prefix is pure typography preference; analyzer default is Hidden — listed explicitly to defend against generalAction.
UnusedPageFieldTrigger. A trigger that can never fire (the property setting makes it dead) is a real bug.
ExternalEventMissingObsoleteMarker. External events that consumers depend on must have an obsolete contract.
ExternalEventMissingObsoleteAttribute. Obsolete marker and attribute must agree.
ExternalEventCannotBeMovedWithTable. Moving an external event across apps breaks every subscriber.
UseFieldTableCaptionForUserMessages. FieldCaption/TableCaption respect localization; FieldName/TableName don't.
CalcDateOnlyWithDateFormulaUsage. CalcDate with non-DateFormula arg silently miscomputes.
PlaceholderShouldHaveCommentExplainingContent. Comment explaining each placeholder is essential for translators and for agents generating localized variants.
AutoFormatTypeMustBeFilledOnPageForFields. Decimal page fields without AutoFormatType render unformatted to end users.
AutoFormatExpressionMustBeFilledOnPageForFields. AutoFormatType=Amount requires an expression to pick the currency.
AutoFormatTypeMustBeFilledOnTableForFields. Table-level AutoFormatType propagates to every page exposing the field.
AutoFormatExpressionMustBeFilledOnTableForFields. Same as AA0472 for table-level AutoFormat.
OnlyTruncateOnSupportedTable. Truncate on unsupported tables silently does nothing.
InvalidAITestConfiguration. AI-test config errors block the run with confusing messages.
SortUsingStatements. User decision: pure ordering preference, not enforceable.
Undocumented internal CodeCop diagnostic — no public MS Learn page. Hidden until Microsoft documents it.
UICop: XMLPort request page in Web client. The web client cannot render XMLPort request pages — end-user-visible breakage.
UICop: Actions+Fields in Cue Groups. Web client drops Actions inside cue groups — end-user-visible breakage.
UICop: Repeater contains Parts. Web client doesn't render Parts inside repeaters.
UICop: Blob as field source. Blob cannot be a page field source — runtime error in the client.
UICop: Action without Image. Actions without Image render blank in the BC client; degrades discoverability for end users.
UICop: UsageCategory/ApplicationArea. Pages/reports without UsageCategory + ApplicationArea are unreachable via Tell Me / search.
UICop: Repeater contains FlowFilter. Web client can't display FlowFilter fields inside repeaters.
UICop: Repeater outside List page. Repeaters are only valid on List/ListPart/Worksheet — placing one elsewhere breaks layout.
UICop: Blob with Bitmap subtype. Bitmap blob is deprecated; use Media/MediaSet.
UICop: Repeater placement. Repeater must be at the start of area(Content) — wrong placement breaks layout.
UICop: PromotedOnly missing. Without PromotedOnly the action shows twice in the menu — UX bug visible to end users.
UICop: Teaching tip properties. Mis-configured teaching tips break onboarding flows.
UICop: Hidden group with promoted actions. Hiding a group with promoted actions leaves orphan actions on the action bar.
UICop: Hidden group with ActionRef. Same orphan issue for ActionRefs.
UICop: Scope=Repeater not promoted. Scope=Repeater actions are invisible if not promoted.
UICop: RichTextEditor not alone in FastTab. Rich Text Editor requires exclusive ownership of its container.
UICop: MaskType in repeater. MaskType is not supported in repeater context — silent input corruption.
PerTenantExtensionCop: ObjectIdMustBeInFreeRange. Object ID outside the free range collides with platform/marketplace objects.
PerTenantExtensionCop: FieldIdMustBeInFreeRange. Same collision risk for field IDs.
PerTenantExtensionCop: NoCompanyOpenSubscribers. User decision: not enforced.
PerTenantExtensionCop: TableNeedsMatchingPermissionSet. Every table needs a permission set in PTE.
PerTenantExtensionCop: CompilationTargetAllowed. Wrong target breaks SaaS multi-tenant deployment.
PerTenantExtensionCop: EncryptionKeyFunctionsForbidden. Encryption-key APIs are restricted in PTE.
PerTenantExtensionCop: TestAssertNonTestForbidden. Test assertion APIs only allowed in test codeunits.
PerTenantExtensionCop: ApplicationAreaRequired. PTE pages need ApplicationArea for visibility filtering.
PerTenantExtensionCop: AppJsonForbiddenProperty. PTE app.json must not include certain properties.
PerTenantExtensionCop: ExtensionNameTooLong. Name limit enforced by the marketplace.
PerTenantExtensionCop: PublisherNameTooLong. Same length limit for publisher.
PerTenantExtensionCop: InternalsVisibleToWarning. User decision: not enforced.
PerTenantExtensionCop: EntitlementsForbidden. User decision: not enforced.
PerTenantExtensionCop: NoPermissionSetsInXml. PermissionSets must be AL, not XML.
PerTenantExtensionCop: ExtensionNameInvalid. Invalid characters in extension name.
PerTenantExtensionCop: PermSet extension foreign-object perms. Permission scope must stay local to the extension.
PerTenantExtensionCop: PermSet extension foreign permission sets.
PerTenantExtensionCop: PermSet extension transitive foreign perms.
PerTenantExtensionCop: PermSet extension wildcards. Wildcard grants are unauditable.
PerTenantExtensionCop: UseApplicationProperty. Use the 'application' property instead of an explicit Base App dependency.
PerTenantExtensionCop: ReservedNamespace. Reserved namespaces are platform-owned.
PerTenantExtensionCop: MemberIdInAllowedRange. Member ID must be in the allowed PTE range.
PerTenantExtensionCop: EnumOrdinalInAllowedRange. Same range constraint for enum ordinals.
PerTenantExtensionCop: NoTableOrFieldMove. Moving tables/fields across apps breaks downstream data.
PerTenantExtensionCop: DuplicateObjectNames. Duplicate object names break symbol resolution.
PerTenantExtensionCop: AllowInCustomizations. End-user personalization detail; analyzer default is Hidden — listed explicitly to defend against generalAction.
LinterCop: ObjectIdInDeclaration. Literal object IDs in declarations make refactoring brittle; use name references.
LinterCop: MaintainabilityIndexMetric. Per-procedure metric emission — fires on every procedure as Info noise; LC0008 threshold gives the actionable signal.
LinterCop: MaintainabilityIndexThreshold. MI below threshold means hard-to-maintain procedure.
LinterCop: CyclomaticComplexityMetric. Per-procedure metric noise; LC0010 threshold is the actionable rule.
LinterCop: CyclomaticComplexityThreshold. Excess branches mean hard-to-test code paths.
LinterCop: DataClassificationRedundancy. Redundant field-level DataClassification rots when table-level changes.
LinterCop: ApplicationAreaRedundancy. Redundant control-level ApplicationArea same problem.
LinterCop: EventSubscriberIdentifiers. String-literal event args silently break when the publisher renames; identifier syntax is symbol-checked.
LinterCop: RecordInstanceIsolationLevel. Explicit ReadIsolation is clearer than LockTable and avoids unintended write locks.
LinterCop: AppManifestRuntimeBehind. Lagging runtime in app.json silently misses platform features.
LinterCop: ExplicitlySetRunTrigger. Implicit RunTrigger=false on Insert/Modify/Delete silently skips triggers — explicit form documents intent.
LinterCop: UseSecretText. Plain Text for credentials leaks via logs and debugger.
LinterCop: ErrorWithTextConstant. Bare Error('text') skips telemetry; use Label or ErrorInfo.
LinterCop: InternalProcedureNotReferenced. Dead internal procedures rot.
LinterCop: InternalProcedureOnlyUsedInCurrentObject. User decision: keeping internal scope is acceptable even when only used in-object.
LinterCop: InterfaceObjectNameGuide. Interface name starting with 'I' is a strong agent-readable convention.
LinterCop: ApiPageFieldNameGuide. API page field name conventions are part of the public API contract.
LinterCop: UseIsEmpty. 'Count = 0' counts all rows then compares; IsEmpty short-circuits — real perf.
LinterCop: UseQueryOrFindWithNext. Count for existence check is wasteful.
LinterCop: BuiltInDateTimeMethod. Built-in date helpers are faster and DST-aware.
LinterCop: PageStyleStringLiteral. Page Style must be an enum value, not a string.
LinterCop: OptionShouldBeEnum. Enum is extensible across apps; Option isn't — modernization plus correctness.
LinterCop: CognitiveComplexityMetric. Per-procedure metric noise; LC0090 threshold gives the actionable signal.
LinterCop: CognitiveComplexityThreshold. High cognitive complexity means hard to reason about.
LinterCop: TranslatableTextShouldBeTranslated. Untranslated Labels ship the source-language string to every locale.
LinterCop: NamesPattern. User decision: not enforced.
LinterCop: AllowInCustomizationsRedundancy. Redundant AllowInCustomizations value.
LinterCop: ParameterNotReferenced. Unused parameter is dead API surface; for forced-signature cases (subscribers, interface methods) the fix is signature trimming, not suppression.
LinterCop: UnnecessaryRecordParameter. User decision: not enforced.
ApplicationCop: DrillDownPageId/LookupPageId required. Tables surfaced on list pages need explicit drill-down + lookup pages for end-user navigation.
ApplicationCop: SinglePkNotBlank. User decision: not enforced.
ApplicationCop: NoSeriesNotBlankFalse. User decision: not enforced.
ApplicationCop: ConfirmThroughConfirmMgt. Raw Confirm() bypasses the test-friendly Confirm Management abstraction.
ApplicationCop: GlobalLanguageThroughHelper. Raw GlobalLanguage() is not test-friendly; use Translation Helper.
ApplicationCop: PageRunThroughPageManagement. Page.Run() bypasses the centralized page-management hooks used by personalization and security.
ApplicationCop: InstallUpgradeInternal. Install/Upgrade codeunits should be Internal so external callers can't misuse them.
ApplicationCop: DataPerCompanyExplicit. User decision: implicit DataPerCompany default is acceptable. (Analyzer default: disabled.)
ApplicationCop: PermSetCaptionLength. PermissionSet Caption length is enforced at install time — fail early at compile.
ApplicationCop: PermSetCoverage. Every object must be in a PermissionSet — required for non-SUPER install.
ApplicationCop: MissingCaptions. End-user UI — un-captioned objects show as raw identifiers in personalization/search.
ApplicationCop: NoEventsInInternalCodeunits. Internal codeunit publishing events leaks an unstable hook to consumers.
ApplicationCop: DropDownBrickFieldGroups. DropDown/Brick fieldgroups define how the table appears in lookups and tiles. (Analyzer default: disabled — listed Error explicitly.)
ApplicationCop: TooltipEndsWithDot. End-user UI text consistency — Tooltips are sentences.
ApplicationCop: TooltipStartsWithSpecifies. End-user UI text convention.
ApplicationCop: NoLineBreaksInTooltip. Line breaks in Tooltips render as literal text in the BC client.
ApplicationCop: TooltipMax200. Tooltip ≤200 chars — anything longer truncates in the UI.
ApplicationCop: EmptyCaptionLocked. Empty Caption must be Locked so the translation pipeline knows it's intentional.
ApplicationCop: EnumZeroEmpty. User decision: not enforced.
ApplicationCop: TokLabelLocked. Labels suffixed Tok must be Locked or they get translated.
ApplicationCop: LockedLabelTokSuffix. User decision: not enforced. (Analyzer default: disabled.)
ApplicationCop: EmptyEnumNoCaption. Empty enum value with a Caption is contradictory.
ApplicationCop: EnumValueNeedsCaption. Enum values without Caption are not selectable in the UI.
ApplicationCop: EventPublisherNotPublic. Public event publishers leak unstable hooks.
ApplicationCop: LFSeparatorFromTypeHelper. Inline \r\n string literals break on Unix runtimes — use Type Helper.
ApplicationCop: ExplicitAllowInCustomizations. Excluded fields need explicit AllowInCustomizations so personalization behavior is deterministic.
ApplicationCop: TokSuffixForTokenLabels. User decision: not enforced.
ApplicationCop: TableFieldTooltip. Table field Tooltips propagate to every page — single source for UI text.
ApplicationCop: DuplicateTooltipPageTable. User decision: pages must override the table-level Tooltip rather than inherit it verbatim.
ApplicationCop: UseReturnForErrorHandling. Return-value error handling beats out-band Error() for testability.
ApplicationCop: MissingTableDataPermission. Each object must declare its tabledata permissions so indirect-permission runs work — critical for non-SUPER installs.

ApplicationCop: UnusedPermissionDeclared. False positive on query nested dataitems whose tables are accessed via DataItemLink rather than directly — AC0031 fires if the Permissions entry is absent, AC0032 fires if present. AC0031 retained to keep the 'declare your tabledata permissions explicitly' enforcement.
PlatformCop: FlowFieldsNotEditable. Editable FlowField is a contradiction — value comes from a sum, not from user input.
PlatformCop: AutoIncrementInTempTable. AutoIncrement on temp table doesn't work — silent bug.
PlatformCop: SetRangeFilterOperators. SetRange doesn't accept filter operators — SetFilter is the right API.
PlatformCop: ListOneBased. AL List is 1-based; using index 0 silently fails.
PlatformCop: ExtensibleExplicit. Explicit Extensible avoids future-proofing surprises.
PlatformCop: AccessExplicit. Explicit Access avoids accidental over-exposure.
PlatformCop: AutoCalcFieldsOnFlowFields. AutoCalcFields on non-FlowField is a no-op that misleads about cost.
PlatformCop: OperatorAndPlaceholderInFilter. Filter operator + placeholder collision yields wrong filters.
PlatformCop: EventSubscriberVarKeyword. var mismatch between event publisher and subscriber breaks compilation cross-version.
PlatformCop: EventPublisherIsHandledByVar. IsHandled must be var so subscribers can flip it.
PlatformCop: FlowFilterAssignment. FlowFilter assignment is silently ignored — must use filtering methods.
PlatformCop: RecordGetArgs. Wrong-typed Record.Get args fail at runtime, not compile.
PlatformCop: JsonTokenJPathDoubleQuotes. JsonToken JPath with double quotes silently fails.
PlatformCop: GuidEmptyStringCompare. Comparing Guid to '' never matches; IsNullGuid is the API.
PlatformCop: ClearCodeunitSingleInstance. Clear() on SingleInstance globals is a no-op — common confusion.
PlatformCop: PageRecordArgumentMismatch. SetRecord with wrong type fails at runtime.
PlatformCop: PageRecordMethodNeedsSourceTable. Page record method on a page with no SourceTable fails at runtime.
PlatformCop: FilterSingleQuoteEscape. Unescaped single quotes in filter strings break the filter parser.
PlatformCop: TransferFieldsTypeMismatch. Type mismatch silently drops fields.
PlatformCop: TransferFieldsNameMismatch. Name mismatch silently drops fields.
PlatformCop: PossibleOverflowAssigning. Silent truncation when source text exceeds target capacity.
PlatformCop: IsHandledAssignment. Wrong IsHandled assignment in event signature breaks the override contract.
PlatformCop: ApplicationAreaOnApiPage. ApplicationArea has no effect on API pages — misleading.
PlatformCop: ODataKeyFieldsSystemId. API pages without ODataKeyFields=SystemId break OData ETag semantics.
PlatformCop: MandatoryFieldOnApiPage. Mandatory fields missing on API page produce confusing 400 responses.
PlatformCop: TempRecordTrigger. Temp record table triggers don't fire — confusing for test fixtures.
PlatformCop: TableRelationFieldLength. TableRelation field length mismatch silently truncates.
PlatformCop: UseCreateSequentialGuid. CreateGuid for key fields fragments storage; CreateSequentialGuid is the right API.
PlatformCop: UsePartialRecordsOnRead. Full-record reads pull every column from SQL even when only one is used — real perf cost on large tables.
PlatformCop: NoPartialRecordsBeforeWrite. Partial records before Insert/Modify silently zero non-loaded fields.
PlatformCop: ReportLayoutPropertyTooLong. Report layout property over max length fails at install.
PlatformCop: DuplicateODataEntityName. Duplicate OData entity names cause client-side ambiguity.
PlatformCop: PlaceholderArgumentCountMismatch. Placeholder/arg count mismatch is a real runtime bug.
TestAutomationCop: GlobalTestMethodRequiresTestAttribute. Global procedures in test codeunits without [Test] attribute are silently skipped — test pretends to exist.
FormattingCop: SemicolonAfterMethodDecl. Pure typography — semicolon after method declaration.
FormattingCop: CasingMismatch. Inconsistent casing breaks grep/pattern-matching and signals reader confusion about identity.
FormattingCop: UseParenthesisForFunctionCalls. Consistent function-call syntax — the AL-runtime version of AA0008.
FormattingCop: PermissionDeclarationOrder. Pure typography — alphabetical permission declarations.
DocumentationCop: CommitNeedsComment. Manual Commit() is a transactional boundary — the *why* must be documented for anyone reading later (human or agent).
DocumentationCop: FlowFieldWriteNeedsComment. Writing to a FlowField is unusual and needs explicit justification.
DocumentationCop: EmptyStatementNeedsComment. Intentional empty statement (e.g., dummy if/then) needs a comment explaining it was deliberate.
DocumentationCop: PublicProcedureXmlDoc. XML doc comments are human-readable documentation; analyzer default is disabled — listed explicitly so generalAction can't promote it.
DocumentationCop: XmlDocMatchesSignature. Consistency rule for human-readable XML docs we're not maintaining.
